writers.lyricist: Lady Gaga/Lukas Nelson/Nick Monson/Mark Nilan Jr/Blair
writers.composer: Lukas Nelson/Nick Monson/Mark Nilan Jr/Blair/Lady Gaga

lyrics.text: I'll undress you, 'cause you're tired
lyrics.translation: 我会为你褪下外衣 因为你看起来疲惫不堪

lyrics.text: Cover you as you desire
lyrics.translation: 我会像你希望的那样成为你的避难所

lyrics.text: When you fall asleep inside my arms
lyrics.translation: 当你在我怀中酣畅入眠

lyrics.text: May not have the fancy things
lyrics.translation: 也许没有那些华丽的藻饰

lyrics.text: But I'll give you everything
lyrics.translation: 但我会给你我的一切

lyrics.text: You could ever want, it's in my arms
lyrics.translation: 你想要的一切，都在我的臂弯中

lyrics.text: So baby tell me yes
lyrics.translation: 所以亲爱的，你只要说愿意

lyrics.text: And I will give you everything
lyrics.translation: 我会毫无保留 给你想要的一切

lyrics.text: So baby tell me yes
lyrics.translation: 所以亲爱的，你只要说愿意

lyrics.text: And I will be all yours tonight
lyrics.translation: 今夜我的身心完全属于你

lyrics.text: So baby tell me yes
lyrics.translation: 所以亲爱的，只要你应允

lyrics.text: And I will give you everything
lyrics.translation: 我会毫无保留 给你想要的一切

lyrics.text: I will be right by your side
lyrics.translation: 无论如何我将陪伴在你身边

lyrics.text: If I can't find the cure l'll
lyrics.translation: 如果找不到治愈良方

lyrics.text: I'll fix you with my love
lyrics.translation: 我会用满腔爱意抚平你的伤痛

lyrics.text: No matter what you know l'll
lyrics.translation: 不管你是否知道

lyrics.text: I'll fix you with my love
lyrics.translation: 我会用满腔爱意抚平你的伤痛

lyrics.text: And if you say you're okay
lyrics.translation: 即使你佯装没事

lyrics.text: I'm gonna heal you anyway
lyrics.translation: 我也会义无反顾地治愈你的伤痛

lyrics.text: Promise I'll always be there
lyrics.translation: 我承诺，我会永远守护你

lyrics.text: Promise I'll be the cure (Be the cure)
lyrics.translation: 我承诺，我会是治愈你的良药

lyrics.text: Rub your feet, your hands, your legs
lyrics.translation: 轻轻按摩你的双脚，你的双手，你的双腿

lyrics.text: Let me take care of it, babe
lyrics.translation: 让我来为你消除疲惫吧

lyrics.text: Close your eyes, I'll sing your favorite song
lyrics.translation: 闭上你的双眼，我要哼唱你最爱的歌曲

lyrics.text: I wrote you this lullaby
lyrics.translation: 我为你写下这首催眠曲

lyrics.text: Hush now baby, don't you cry
lyrics.translation: 安静吧 宝贝，别哭了

lyrics.text: Anything you want could not be wrong
lyrics.translation: 你想要的都没有过错

lyrics.text: So baby tell me yes
lyrics.translation: 所以亲爱的，你只要说愿意

lyrics.text: And I will give you everything
lyrics.translation: 我会毫无保留 给你想要的一切
